response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Own SoC trajectory critical and below recovery threshold; islanded state with no inbound supply makes any outbound share incompatible with minimum operating reserve requirement—defer until grid reconnection or own SoC recovers above 0.60 kWh.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c4. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.45 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded, declining SoC under 1.0 kW load; no inbound supply detected. Minimum operating reserve (0.30 kWh) is critical. Reject all normal-priority requests. Only consider minimal shares (0.05 kW/tick) to lowest-SoC peer (r1c5) if own SoC recovers above 0.60 kWh. Prioritize own survival and signal urgent need for grid reconnection or external generation..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
